releases.description: NoteDraw 0.2.38 release assets built and attested by GitHub Actions.
releases.name: NoteDraw 0.2.38

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Aligns the published release with the newer Obsidian API level expected by community review while keeping the directive-comment fix.
releases.name: NoteDraw 0.2.37

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Restores compatibility with Obsidian 1.12.7 by avoiding the newer activeDocument API import while keeping the community-review directive-comment fix.
releases.name: NoteDraw 0.2.36

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Fixes the community automated review directive-comment error by adding a description to the ESLint enable comment.
releases.name: NoteDraw 0.2.35

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Reduces automated community review warnings by using activeDocument/window timers, removing deprecated caretRangeFromPoint fallback, removing unused catch placeholders, and documenting scoped ESLint disables for JavaScript dynamic Obsidian/DOM integration warnings.
releases.name: NoteDraw 0.2.34

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Fixes remaining automated community review errors by raising minAppVersion to 1.13.1 and renaming the settings heading so it does not include the plugin name.
releases.name: NoteDraw 0.2.33

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Fixes Obsidian community review blockers: adds LICENSE, removes redundant wording from the manifest description, raises minAppVersion to match used APIs, removes CSS !important rules, replaces direct source style assignments where practical, and updates source modules to ESM.
releases.name: NoteDraw 0.2.32

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: NoteDraw 0.2.31 release for Obsidian community plugin distribution. Includes the standard Obsidian plugin assets: manifest.json, main.js, and styles.css.
releases.name: NoteDraw 0.2.31

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Hotfixes reading-view controller mounting and magic-wand fallback after embedded-note scope changes. Root reading views now always bind to the active note file, while embedded previews can still scope drawings to their source path.
releases.name: NoteDraw v0.2.9

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Improves text tool interactions: text elements can be double-clicked to edit again, selected text elements remain selected when clicked without moving, Markdown rendered text can still be edited while the text tool is active, B/I/U style commands apply to the active rendered Markdown editor when possible, and the Text panel is smaller with fewer categories.
releases.name: NoteDraw v0.2.8

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Text and shape tools now select existing drawing elements before creating new ones. Clicking an existing element with the text tool selects it like the pen/select workflow; clicking the selected element can start dragging it.
releases.name: NoteDraw v0.2.7

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Moves text, title, code, file, text style, box, line, and arrow tools into a categorized Text panel instead of spreading them across the main toolbar. Keeps the main toolbar compact while preserving the new text and shape capabilities.
releases.name: NoteDraw v0.2.6

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Adds first-pass floating text, button-style text boxes, rectangles, straight lines, and arrows. Text supports bold, italic, underline, and boxed style toggles. Drawing inside embedded note previews is stored against the embedded note path so opening that note shows the same drawing layer.
releases.name: NoteDraw v0.2.5

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Fixes toolbar drift while scrolling by anchoring the floating toolbar below the Obsidian view header instead of the scrolling note container.
releases.name: NoteDraw v0.2.4

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Adds common color swatches to the pen and watercolor palette plus an advanced color picker entry. Swatches update the current brush immediately and keep separate pen/watercolor settings.
releases.name: NoteDraw v0.2.3

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Active pen and watercolor toolbar buttons now use their current brush color as the button background, with automatic icon contrast for readability.
releases.name: NoteDraw v0.2.2

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Adds a real source build structure with src/ source files and esbuild. The Obsidian runtime remains a standard root main.js build artifact. No behavior changes intended from v0.2.0.
releases.name: NoteDraw v0.2.1

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Full rename to NoteDraw with plugin id notedraw. Adds migration from the previous local drawing data folder, public API hooks for AI/plugin automation, settings, circular toolbar buttons, lazy drawing-data loading, and improved text caret behavior.
releases.name: NoteDraw v0.2.0

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Release v0.1.24. Includes local source updates from v0.1.23 and v0.1.24: toolbar/canvas scrolling fixes, simplified watercolor controls, better selection clearing, improved reading preview caret targeting, and source/edit view CodeMirror tap forwarding. SHA256: 806E879D7B288645DFCFB41F9C3CA01E8F13966B666BF74AE2F213C19A0EFE36
releases.name: Note Doodle Preview v0.1.24

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Adds the same packaged support QR codes used by the user's other plugins to the settings page. Includes the latest drawing, toolbar, source-mode, resize, and performance improvements.
releases.name: v0.1.22

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Fix duplicate magic-wand action buttons when multiple notes or embedded previews render. Keeps the v0.1.9 drawing and toolbar baseline.
releases.name: v0.1.12

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Prototype baseline v0.1.9: preview text editing, doodle drawing, stroke selection/move/delete, two-finger scroll support, and Obsidian header magic-wand entry.
releases.name: v0.1.9
